Name: Retinol
Note: Retinol accelerates cell turnover but makes skin highly sensitive to UV rays. Sunscreen is MANDATORY the next morning.

Name: Vitamin C
Note: A powerful antioxidant for day protection. Do not layer with Retinol in the same routine to prevent severe irritation.

Name: UV Filters (Zinc Oxide)
Note: Provides critical UV protection, essential when using retinoids or chemical exfoliants.

Name: Calcium
Note: Crucial for bone density. Best absorbed when combined with Vitamin D3; avoid taking at the same time as Iron.

Name: Vitamin D3
Note: Synergizes with Calcium to maximize bone absorption and longevity.
